scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:functional
scripts.test:functional:coverage: npm run build && c8 --config-file c8.functional.json vitest run --config vitest.functional.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run test:functional:coverage
